reviews.review_description:
My favorite game, but it’s impossible to play in public lobbies. You get killed by players every time and flag system doesn’t  help.

Note to devs:
Devs if you’re reading please, please, please add 
Non-pvp lobbies to the game for people who want to play the game but not die to other players

🛑🛑🛑🛑Read Before You Play. DON’T waste your time! SCAM GAME

Sail VR could be great, but the mods and dev support ruin it. The devs made kids into moderators, and some of them power trip hard. People was banned with zero proof, just speculation, and when asked for evidence, nobody could provide anything.

Meanwhile, there are videos of these mods taking advantage of the game, and nothing happens to them—but regular players get banned instantly.

If you plan to spend money or grind seriously, be warned: the moderation is inconsistent, unprofessional, and you’ll get no real support from the dev team when things go wrong.

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry to hear about your experience. Moderation decisions are not based on speculation alone, and reports and actions are always reviewed against our community guidelines before enforcement.

We hold all our Sail VR moderators to clear standards, and any concerns about moderator conduct are taken seriously and investigated. If you have specific examples or believe a mistake was made, we encourage you to email us at support@redteam.games so we can further investigate. 

Our goal is to maintain a fair and consistent environment for all players, and we’re continuously working to improve both moderation and support.

reviews.review_description: This game is so good it’s crazy water and graphics crazy how a game 6 years ago went to bad to good not only that the battle mechanics are so good but maybe if we could add the cannnons but below of gallon would be good but it’s just so good I never thought a free game could be so good tysm devs u work so hard u do the best same for everyone else

This is a very good game. It is infact one of my favourite games. But, moderation is TERRIBLE. Moderators will straight up BAN you because you kill them. This has happened to me twice. It always happens in dead man's, and toxic angry lvl 99 mods will ban, harass and target you. Hackers now can UNBAN themselves making it even more unsafe. Please ban these hackers and fix moderation. Mods ban, solely because they can. All of the moderators are friends, they ban for the fun of it and in NO way do they benefit the game. Developers, stop ignoring us. Hire REAL moderators. Sorry to be informal here, but they are straight chuds. FIX IT. HIRE REAL MODERATORS. My most favourite game, ruined because of moderation. 1 star. Is not changing till moderation gets fixed.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! We've heard the community's concerns regarding moderation and have already begun a thorough review of our mod team and processes. All moderators are currently being evaluated based on community feedback, conduct, and adherence to our moderation standards. You're welcome to participate in the ongoing vote in our Discord server and share your opinions on which mods remain on the mod team!

Our moderators receive extensive training and are expected to follow strict guidelines. Any moderator found to be abusing their position or failing to meet those standards will be removed from the team.

We'd also like to clarify that hackers cannot unban themselves. Any claims suggesting otherwise are simply incorrect.

reviews.review_description: this is a great game with a lot of great potential the problem is the developers and discord members evidently you as a player can be accused of anything by a moderator and be banned no evidence no proof and no way of knowing the same player being toxic is a moderator freedom of speech isn't a thing here telling someone to f off gets u banned for sexual language there's way to much toxicity 💯 funny how y'all hiding reviews now too so let's be open about it cause I kept the receipts from both discussions from discord and discussion with red sail side too y'all blantley lie about moderators being vetted and they earn their tittles but yet the same mod who banned me was only apart of the discord less then a year4 months to be exact  and provided zero proof of the allegations he made that got me banned don't listen to none of their bull shalarky it's all lies and games

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing your feedback. We take accusations of moderator abuse seriously and do not support moderators issuing punishments without cause or evidence.

All moderators are required to follow established guidelines and are regularly reviewed. In response to recent community concerns, we have also begun a broader review of our moderation team and processes. Community members are welcome to participate in the ongoing moderator vote in our Discord server and share their feedback.

We would also like to clarify that we do not hide or remove negative reviews simply because they are critical of the game or staff. We welcome constructive feedback and use it to help improve both the game and the community experience.

reviews.review_description: Hello I am a former player of Sail vr and throughout the years I've been playing I realized, The sail mods or devs do not listen to the community. They don't let the community have a voice nor listen to suggestion regarding their game. Sail vr has turned into a money grab and the devs don't even care enough to take one suggestion, The mods are corrupt as well for example "Nick" is a sail vr mod and he bans people if he doesn't like them. Not because of racism or toxicity just because they killed him too much. Do NOT get this game

developer_response.body:
Thanks for taking the time to share your feedback.

We don’t agree with the claim that we ignore the community or that moderation decisions are made based on personal feelings. Moderators are expected to follow strict guidelines and are held accountable through ongoing review processes. Any reports of inappropriate moderator behavior are taken seriously and investigated. If you would like to report a moderator, please send us an email to support@redteam.games. 

We also regularly review community suggestions and feedback as part of our development process, even if we’re not always able to implement every request.

reviews.review_description:
I’m leaving this review to warn anyone thinking about getting into Sail VR. The game itself is fun, but the moderation is a disaster. The devs handed mod power to kids, and some of them abuse it big time. People are getting banned with no proof, just guesses and “looks suspicious.”

If you value your time or money, be careful.

developer_response.body:
We’re glad you’re enjoying the game, but we’re sorry to hear about your concerns. 

We hold our moderators to clear and high standards, and any reports of misuse are taken seriously. If you believe a decision was made in error, we encourage you to reach out to support@redteam.games via email so it can be properly reviewed.

We’re committed to maintaining a fair and consistent experience for all players and continuously improving our processes. Thank you for playing Sail!

reviews.review_description: They false banned me because some idiot reported me for " Sexual harrasment" Context, i touched his nose, as it was a jack o lantern head, basically what i'm saying is they will ban you for anything, aslong as you get reported, your banned, now i get u have serious moderation, but this is too serious. (i type this all on meta, please look at this.)

developer_response.body:
We take reports of harassment seriously, and all cases are reviewed in context before moderation decisions are made.

If you believe this action was taken in error, we encourage you to submit an appeal through our support channels or by emailing us at support@redteam.games so the situation can be reviewed more thoroughly. Thank you for playing Sail!

reviews.review_description: Sail Vr is so fun and funny at times and the community is mostly kind I've only ever seen a few people being toxic BUT I've never seen a kid as a moderator?!?! Like people say that kids are moderators but all the kids I seen in it are harmless and are just there for fun but the people who say they saw a kid mod are mostly lying and also when people say that they got banned from a small thing are trying to cover up what they actually did now buying things in the game is fine I bought a pack and have had it for so so long and they don't do stuff like give your ship buffers they  give you ship pants, Star coins, outfit, cosmetics for the outfit like a hook and in my opinion good moding by developers but I wish we could use the bottom cannons on The Galleon

reviews.review_title: Make sure you get this game
reviews.review_description: I got this game after seeing many videos on social media and when i got it as the first person to play it in my friend group let me tell you words dont even put into context how amazing this game is i play it for hours on end solo and with friends and I will say i WANT not NEED a sea of thieves like experience when it comes to set missions from npcs and multi deck ships however that is just something that would make this experience that little bit more fun for me and it is still great without it

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind review! We're glad you're enjoying playing Sail VR. Keep an eye out for our next few updates, we've got some new exciting stuff in the works that we hope you'll love.

reviews.review_description: In my 2 years of playing I have never even seen a mod never mind kids abusing mod. The game is amazing he feelingof finding out how to customize your pirate, The feeeling of buying ur first galleon is unmatched good pvp had combat or ship pvp is amazing I wish they would add quests from sea of thieves tho or cursed cannonballs apart from that the game is good even with people saying the community is bad  is fake  I once had kids sink me and even after that the let me join their crew and there is loads of people grinding or just goofing around but these people are too lazy Yeah I won't lie there is some nerds who will sink whiteflag-trader flag ships for. No reason but that is a one on a million thingAMAZING GAME LEEP PUMPING OUT THESE BANGERS!!!!!

I am an OG player, I bought this game when it first came out and followed Garrett when it was still just an idea, I've been seeing alot of comments claiming devs don't listen to the player base whis is simply not true, as for moderators yes of course your going to run into power trippers however the team is obviously taking that seriously. I'll be honest when multiplayer first went live i was a guy who knew all the glitches and tricks, things like rapid fire or hiding in the hull of someone's ship etc...one they announced doing so could lead to a ban i stopped. over the years updates have been made to fix these issues and make it enjoyable for everyone. These days I just enjoy sailing around and doing some pvp. I just want to say thank you to the team for everything they do as it doesn't go unnoticed and keep up all of the great work you've been doing! I'm just happy this game never became a pay to win experience. I've personally recommended this game to many people whom have joined and love it, the experience will only be as good as we make it!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. We're grateful to you for supporting Sail for so many years!

reviews.review_title: great but would ask for a other port opt
reviews.review_description: its amazing game i would recommend it but please maybe add a more peacefully port thing where people can't kill you and sink your ship as even when I do fly the flag that is meant to tell others that you don't want trouble and say you don't want to fight people still fight and destroy my ship. but overall it is a amazing game and would highly recommend

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! We'll pass along your feedback. Please note that port is a no-PVP zone so you and your ship should be safe there.

reviews.review_title: I want the game to improve
reviews.review_description: Add weather conditions to the game, like rain. Make the ocean hurricanes capable of damaging players and the ship. Make lightning strikes occasionally in the ocean, causing damage. Make it so I can lock the ship's helm because crazy players are grabbing my ship's helm and steering it however they want.

Very good game I love to play it with my friends, this is one of the best multiplayer games to play with friends. There are a lot of bugs but they aren't really that bad and the dev team needs working on. The customization of characters allows very unique avatars and boats. Sail vr pls gift me a month of patron 🙏

There was this old man who had voice chat and me and my cousin were trying to get the grappling hook we spent around 2,000 gold to get there we tried so hard and then we made it to the parkour and this man sounded like he was in his 20s around 28? He told my cousin “jump if your 100 health or lower” my cousin was 175 health so she didn’t she could only hear not chat/talk and he pushed her off and killed us with a blunderbuss and then said “pfft lil kids so easy” please ban him he was wearing a blue skeleton had a pirate hat and a coat and we didn’t do anything we tried and then he killed us sail/people please ban them we didn’t do anything we tried as hard as we could thank you 
- Me and my cousin

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry this happened during your session.

We can’t take moderation action directly from a public review, and we don’t issue bans based on descriptions alone. However, behavior like griefing or exploiting voice chat can be reviewed when properly reported in-game, especially with details like usernames, timestamps, or clips.

Please submit this through our support/report system so our moderation team can investigate it properly.

developer_response.body: sorry  to hear about your experience. Please feel free to report anyone doing this to support@redteam.games

The bullying and abusive language are rampant to the extent that it and the game need to be looked into by Meta but we all know how they stand. Avoid and don't waste money on this game. If you do play and you are bullied or abused record it and post it. The developer and Meta  need to be held accountable.... 

Update 

You respond by..  you're running a poll. 

I and three others spent two hours trying to calm a child down on your platform. A child who stated they wanted to end it all and you want to run a poll. 

Grow a spine and do the right thing for once in your life. Take matters into your own hands and stomp this out. Running a poll is not dealing with the issue. It's called covering it up. 

Deal with in a manner that's fitting not with a poll. Remember everything is recorded by a lot of people.

developer_response.body:
The poll isn't the only thing we're doing, it's simply a way for the community to share their feedback and vote on which moderators should stay and which should go. 

We also provide our players with multiple reporting tools, both in-game and on Discord, so issues can be brought directly to our attention and investigated appropriately. We've also already started reviewing our moderation team internally and are making changes to how moderation works. 

We're open to hearing your ideas on how else we can improve moderation. Please send us your thoughts via email to support@redteam.games

reviews.review_title: I have no idea why everybody hates it
reviews.review_description:
This game brings the joy of sea of thieves, but in vr
this game is perfect and i love it so much
i have never seen a moderator that was a kid so the people who are writing one star reviews are probbably just mad that the game is hard

but i do have one issue that lets people be unstoppable, 
the respawn thing where i one of your crewmates are alive, then they can respawn, 

but this makes it hard for solo players because it is extremely hard to beat the others if they just keep respawning

i hope this respawn feature can either be removed or the wait time to be increased

i hope everybody understands that this game is worth getting even i it may be really hard

P.S you know the bad reviews are very much exagerated because these people still grind the game and probably spend all of there free time on it, and that is one reason why this game is so peak

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your review! We appreciate the kind words, and we're glad you're enjoying playing Sail. We'll pass along your feedback about the increased wait time on our respawn feature. 

We're committed to creating a safe and fun environment for everyone who plays Sail. We've unfortunately been targeted by a group of individuals who encourage their friends to "review bomb" the game. Thanks for helping us set the record straight!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We're so glad to hear you're enjoying playing Sail VR. We'll pass along your request for heals in Dead Man's Island! Keep an eye out for new updates, we have a big one coming to Dead Man's Island soon!

reviews.review_description: The game is awesome but I loose interest if there are no updates you guys have slowed down your update speed horrendously and it is sad I used to grind this game but it has lost the spirit with updates every month to them 4 times a year disappointed in you devs

i spent about an hour sitting in the fountain never pulling a weapon once and was killed 38 times then they proceeded to hunt me down for trying to go to different places and play sad music alone they were hunting me. and after finally defending myself they began hunting me even worse i've also been banned because i got upset after the after the fact. this game is police and ran by children of self righteous blood hungry kids that cannot control themselves. absolutely horrendous game full of power tripping people with no life. 🤮🤮

reviews.review_title: so fun it felt like i was a real pirate
reviews.review_description:
i feel like a real pirate and as a bounty hunter in this game its so easy and fun to just attack players on there boats and shooting the cannons and overall the boss fights are fun but i think we should have stats for every 15 -20 lvls that increase speed and other things and you get 1 stat point per 10-20 lvls and have to do some task thats not that hard to complete and after you finish the tasl you get to 
 spin a wheel on which stat you get

Its not a bad game I enjoy it and like some of the direction the company is going with as far as quests and enemies. I hope to see alot less time spent on cosmetics and more on the gameplay itself but as I said I do like the direction the games going in. So far I see only two main issues with the game that if fixed would increase the games quality for all players. The first is to make a non pvp server for players who want to journey with their friends or make new friends to journey with, without the hassle of always being trapped by other players. Second fix would be to make the grappling hook a gadget that can go on the belt instead of taking up a necessary weapon slot for combat. I get the design point of making it a weapon but having to choose a gadget thats necessary over a weapon that's needed does tend to make the game harder. I would recommend just making it a non weapon and see how players enjoy it. That's my only two thoughts about the fixes though, I look forward to seeing any new game mechanics and updates you guys bring to this great game.

The game itself is just low quality, but the main issue is the community, I’ve met a bunch of genuinely great people in the community but the moderators are just (mostly) terrible, they will do genuinely anything to preserve their image even when they are downright wrong, they overextend their control and any attempt to build a community space is just taken by the mods.

developer_response.body: Please report any toxic community members to support@redteam.games

reviews.review_title: Fun with friends, but definitely issues.
reviews.review_description: I do like the game, but there are obviously some issues. The game is kinda new, so I'll get to the point. Some treasure hunts that have the bottle you need to look through won't go into your inventory. Losing it means you lose it forever. So fixing the bottle where you follow the stars is all I really am complaining about. Definitely see other issues to do with mostly the skeletons doing a jig like dance. Among some gltiches of being thrown off the ship here and there.

this game ias actually pretty good. im just annoyed that they are adding all these new updates and alot of people have been waiting for the to add female bodies. ive been waiting for 1-2 years for them to add them but they are too busy adding useless updates. they said in another review that they will come around to doing it but never have. find a different game like this were they dont revolve the game around men

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback. Sail VR is still in beta, meaning it is a work-in-progress and isn't considered a finished game yet. Our art team is currently working on adding a female avatar to the game, and she's coming soon! We'd love for you to try her out and hear your honest feedback once she's released. Keep an eye out!

reviews.review_title: Sail vr is past its prime
reviews.review_description: the gameplay loop isn’t bad but unfortunately you don’t really need that much money after getting a ship you want and enough ammunition so you don’t need more than 20k which is quite easy to get and on top of that there’s no real progression and you don’t really unlock anything other than cosmetics so I give the game a 2 out of five it’s pretty mediocre in its current state also not to mention the devs are employing PRE TEENS to be mods yeah great idea it’s very sad to see because I have been playing since single player was released don’t play this game it’s past its prime

If you love adventures especially on the se
a then this game is something for you. The graphics are really good you can play with your friends and make crew with them their are different ships you could choose from this game has everything. It's the best pirate game ever. so go install it and set sail with you're friends

There's literally a group in this game called "The blue beard pirates" who are KNOWN by everyone in the game for sending CSAM material into discord servers and intentionally sending epileptic things to people. They are still around with no sense that moderation has done anything to them.

developer_response.body: Please report any moderators who are doing this IMMEDIATELY to support@redteam.games

reviews.review_title: Love the game, one tiny problem
reviews.review_description:
I love this game and the ability to play with friends. I’ve spent hours in it and am excited by consistent updates, especially the instruments (would love a trumpet or other wind instrument) The bosses are fun, especially the giant skeletons and krakens. My only problem might be a spoiler.







WHOEVER MADE THE OBSTACLE COURSE TO GET THE GRAPPLING HOOK MADE A DEAL WITH SATAN TO TORTURE UNSUSPECTING SOULS! Maybe I’m just bad at the game but after defeating the boss, we nearly sailed back through the portal thinking the grappling gun unlocked. I found the key last minute and turned us around. We went through the door expecting a chest or a fight and found the parkour. I have no problem with this and it makes the game more exciting. My only problem was that we could not leave once in so we had to abandon our treasure in order to escape. There are no checkpoints either, so don’t take anything valuable with you. My friend and I had a blast losing our minds but a heads up would’ve been nice. I cannot overstate how much yelling there was after each fall.

This game is not good here's why.


One your community is full of British snobs that call out slurs and cuss all the time I would rather sit my house and never play vr sometimes then play this. And I still play but the only reasons is you updated the game. Like j was talking to my uncle and some kid was listening and me and my uncle were arguing and the kid says respect your elders and I say bro leave me alone. Not to mention your moderation is trash and everyone on their in dead man's island is a sweat and might even kill you and keep spawn camping. Your game is full of fools with no taste for a game. This game is a sad imitation of sea of theives. I have had to flag this game so hard as I'm tired of being bullied by British snobs on here fix your community. Brashyt would agree he is right

developer_response.body:
We're sorry you've had rough experiences with the community. Harassment and bullying have no place in our game and we're working on improving moderation. 
If you want to report specific players, reach out to us at support@redteam.games and we'll look into it. Appreciate you sticking around despite it all.

reviews.review_description: Hello developers, please read this. Could you add a table where, when you create a ship, it automatically goes there, and where you can pick it up and leave it to go on adventures with other friends' ships, so you don't have to worry about losing yours? And if possible, could you also add two more slots on the table so you can have three different ships?

reviews.review_title: From a fellow developer great game.
reviews.review_description: The game is great the textures and modeling ￼is great the skybox, water, and sound track is amazing. 🤩 The only thing that brought this rating down to 4 stars is the hit boxes and bugs. The hit boxes are petty bad and can feel janky. If you have enough momentum with the grappling hook you can go through walls, you sometimes spawn under the map and just a lot of other bugs. On the other hand, sail is a great game and devs keep up the great work. ￼￼￼￼
Very good no flaws except the community they suck most of the time they usually grief 1v1's and make of you but the is amazing and the most beautiful game ever.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We're sorry to hear you had a bad experience with some of our players. Please make sure you use our in-game reporting tools to report rule breakers and toxicity, that helps us keep the community a safe and positive environment for all.

reviews.review_description: The moderators suck. How many reviews listing the moderation problem have to be posted before the devs do something? Same copy and pasted response from the devs everytime, but not changes. Don’t let this game die, fix the issue so the players are willing to stay.

developer_response.body: We're looking into the moderation issue. Thanks for reporting it.

reviews.review_description: I have been a player of this game since it first came out. I came back recently and I am a little disappointed because not much has changed. I have only played single player (private port + some of my friends), but from what I've heard the moderation is horrible and needs to be fixed ASAP.

Dont waste your time playing this, i died alot of times to glitches and even more to people that just grief even though you use friendly flags like im just doing the magma boss and trying to get the grappling gun just so 5 level 30s can kill me when im 2 jumps away from completing the parkour, there is nowhere to start since nobody cares about you, when you sail by yourself youre instantly dead, just dont get it its rly not worth it putting time into the game just to realize everyone is targeting lower levels, there is alot of scammers in the game and i just cant play in peace like i always put the white flag up and today when i gave the game another chance there were literally 3 ships going after me where there were level 60s and they just killed me like nothing, i keep losing my loot bcs of griefers and even though i managed to get the grappling gun today ofc the guy who helped me destroyed my ship and scammed me out of all my stuff, please just dont play it.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback. Sail is a PvPvE game, which means player encounters, including combat, loss of loot, and competition over objectives, are part of the intended experience. Even with friendly flags enabled, other players may still choose to engage, depending on the situation.

That said, we understand how frustrating repeated negative encounters can be. We're continuously looking at ways to improve balance, onboarding, and the overall new player experience. We'd love to hear your ideas, if you would like to submit them to support@redteam.games.

We also take reports of scams and rule-breaking behavior seriously, and encourage players to submit reports through the proper channels so our team can investigate.

We appreciate you taking the time to share your experience.

reviews.review_description: was banned from the game for 4 days the ban changed to perminnant even though it was my first offence only took one email and was able to get unbanned with a warning

Have been playing for a year now and people and community are fire🔥🔥

Really recommend for people who wanna find a new game w friends or solo

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! We're glad you're enjoying playing Sail. Thanks for your support.

reviews.review_title: Really good but room for improvement
reviews.review_description: If you are looking to get this, the experience is best with friends. A lot of potential. I think the game is fun, chaotic at times, and overall just a good game to plunder ships with friends and fight whatever the sea has for you. I would definitely suggest this for anyone, and START WITH A SLOOP! Also if there’s a dev reading this, add a third ship mount like a… I don’t know but just a cannon and grappler is kinda boring
The game it self is pretty good but the devs and mods are really corrupt the mod are just some 6 year old kid

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! Please note that all our moderators are highly trusted, trained, and at least 16+. If someone is claiming to be a moderator, ask them to show you their badge. If they refuse, that probably means they're not actually a moderator.

reviews.review_description: Its an amazing game, people complain about getting killed, BUT THATS PART OF THE GAME. i love this game even when i get killed.

They're are like 1 or 3 bugs i saw but overall great game i do recemend a lot more sea beasts like a Leviathan, megaladon, or a mossasoras and i think it would be cool if you could buy a sea potion that increases chances of incountering them but overall great game.
It is a good game but please tell the mods to have good sportsmanship BC me and my friend were on a crew and he killed a no BC he started shooting us and my friend got banned

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback. We expect all moderators to act professionally and demonstrate good sportsmanship while playing and moderating.

We've recently begun a broader review of our moderation team and processes in response to community feedback. If any moderator is found to be acting inappropriately or failing to follow our guidelines, appropriate action will be taken.

If your friend believes they were banned unfairly, we encourage them to submit an appeal so the situation can be reviewed by the team. To appeal, send an email to support@redteam.games

reviews.review_description: Spawn killing, kids power tripping with mod banned for no reason, and buggy mechanics terrible graphics do not buy

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! Since Sail is still in early-access (beta), our players will occasionally encounter bugs. We're doing everything we can to fix bugs as quickly as possible. If you have a bug to report, please email us at support@redteam.games so we can add it to our to-fix list. Regarding our moderation system, please reach out to our email address (listed above) if you feel you've been incorrectly or unfairly banned. We're always happy to look into any ban and revise it if appropriate.

reviews.review_description: Spend a good amount of time on this game and it is worth the time many fun things to do recommend to people who like pirates and things like that

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! We're glad you're enjoying playing Sail. We've got some big new updates in the works, so keep an eye out for those!

reviews.review_description:
This game is so fun! I love everything about this game! I have a few suggestions for the game. I think it would be really cool if you added sea storms. Also could you possibly. Pls add more islands and bosses! Also with the respawn system you should be on half health when you respawn. Also can you make port part of world again, it was better that way and the servers can be a bit weird as when you go back it can change servers 

This game is amazing

Just know before you install this, it will infuriate you. Alot. This game is PACKED with so many issues and bugs its not even funny. The only reason I still play this is because I have so much progress. The devs never fix the bugs and all the bugs are extremely annoying. Yesterday, I had 30k gold in my chest and I randomly died out of nowhere. That is just ONE of the many horrible bug experiences ive had in this game. However there are some good qualities about this game. The game runs really well even on the quest 2 and all the cosmetics are really cool. Also, the game isn't money hungry like every other vr game, there are so many ways you can get the in-game currency without paying real money for it. Overall, this game is meh. And if any devs are seeing this, PLEASE FIX YOUR GAME!  

Edit: NERF THE AXES!!!
The game is super awesome and fun to play, but it would be even better if there was stuff like villages on some islands where you can trade or steal loot from other Npcs
it's a really funny game for boating do not play if you if you get sick on water other than that it's really really fun

Please stop giving moderator to kids, I’ve read that it’s a huge problem.

Things to change:
- If not already, don’t give kids moderator permissions, and delete moderator permissions from accounts that aren’t from devs or the devs’ close friends.
- Make ship colours an individual purchase too, hopefully 30-80% off on the first day release.
- Make real purchases a bit cheaper or make the reward larger.
- Change back the weapon equipping method.
- Add more hull and sail upgrades. Maybe like: Advanced hull. Gives a slightly higher base speed and health modifier. Advanced Sails. Gives a slightly higher manoeuvrability and max wind boost modifier. Make these expensive though.
- Add in private servers, a host. This allows them to change the time of day when in port andsome other small changes.
- MAKE CREVICES ABLE TO JUMP OUT OF I KEEP GETTING STUCK IN THEM!
- Change some visual issues, my glove when i turn my hand appears transparent at the bottom and my wrist keeps phasing through as well.

Thanks for reading (if you did) devs and carry on with the epic game :D

reviews.review_title: Still doesnt live up to Sea of thieves
reviews.review_description: The grapple gun just came out and i already have complaints. For one, the collision when using it is terrible. When you grapple onto something, theres a high chance you get stuck on something, like the inside of a wall or some bs, makes it really unituitive. And also, now that the devs have nerfed the throwing axe again and now its damage AND speed are now complete trash, it makes direct melee imposible unless you are on a boat, even for swords and such. Why? Because the only good weapon is a weapon that has a learning curve, the so called weapon for only skilled players, the pistol and sniper. Now only people who have good dynamic vision and reflexes to hit a moving target with ease are allowed to play well, because the melee weapons are too unplayable. Not even the grapple gun helps with this because even if im swinging like spider man, i still get sniped and headshot. Also, sniper players have caught on to melee players antics, and carry a blunderbus and will instakill you with it if you try to close any distance, so the only real option for weapons is pistol or sniper. This is ridiculous, devs! Might as well just remove other weapons if youre going to make them unusable.

You don't want to do anything exept play because of moderators aka kids are banning players just for speaking so please play at risk and to devs please check who is moderators thank you big fan but not fan of fake bans
I love your game but it would be really be cool if the kraken head cosmetic was available every day

This game has great potential and the new waves are good but the islands are not that good at all and the spawn island is horrible also the game needs new boat models and insides of the ship you can access
Me personally I love this game it’s just like sea of theives but I play PlayStation so I can’t so I’m glad I can enjoy the similarities from VR

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! We're glad you're enjoying playing Sail.

reviews.review_title: Fun game but some players toxic
reviews.review_description: The game is fun and no problem except for a few glitches now and then (like my ship disappears or i randomly die for no reason)but like some of the players(like maybe 20 to maybe 40% ) even when you tell them your friendly they just be toxic and cuss and generally grief players and steal other people stuff (i trade often with people and have heard people tell me stuff like that)to the point where i started just avoiding people entirely unless i want to have people on my crew(run by myself most of the time because of the tixic players)

Bro im kinda new to the game and i got a really good boat cannons everything and i die lose everthing then again im new so i dont know you can buy boats back so a leave and rejoin then i lose health potion and i still had no money and i literally lost everything all my progress and it sucks i used to like it.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for trying the game and for the feedback. We’re sorry to hear about the frustration with losing your ship and items early on.

In Sail, ships and loot are part of the core risk-and-reward gameplay loop, and they can be lost through combat or other in-game events. 

We appreciate you giving the game a try and sharing your experience.

reviews.review_description: The game is really good and fun but for some reason I can’t play it

developer_response.body: Oh no! We're sorry to hear that. Please send us an email to support@redteam.games so we can make sure you can play again.

sail is perfect for being a pirate but it is coped off of sea of thieves and the prices of thing are  way to high but sail you need to fix some bugs as well as the new update has come
i had fun. The best friend bounty hunters forever
The only game i play now. Best game ever!

Over time vr gets a little boring and my friend recommended me to this game and it is my favorite game now and it’s based completely off of sea of thieves so if you like sea of thieves then play this and its more fun best vr game besides maybe bonelab but even then this game is so fun and even with friends this game is perfect with friends but like you can fight players bosses and even just plainly fish and there is daily quests so the game is not pay to win because even though you might say “well it is p2w because you need coins to get better ships” but even the most popular sail YouTubers sometimes use rafts (the first ship that you get) it doesn’t matter what ship you get as long as you know how to use it but as I was saying currently this is my favorite game you have to buy this because it’s so good but sadly so underrated not a lot of people play it despite how amazing this game is!!!! Definitely buy 10/5 becuase tita so good 🤩

It’s a great game but I think it would be better if it had a emergency button that would allow you to go back to the port instantly before you die BUT you could only use once a week and u would have to be on an island AND it doesn’t work in port and you would have to have 1000 value+ in your chest.
And I know it’s basically just the respawn button but better. 










Btw y’all gotta let us be able to request to get on a ship with in sight and add a flare gun or something that can alert when you’re stuck.
My boat name was BOB and they thought it was racist so they banned me.

reviews.review_title: Game is fun for Adults and young Adults
reviews.review_description:
Fun game. Has some issues such  they should make NPC enemy more of a challenge like the A.I in Dungeons  of Eternity. Smarter enemy A.I makes it fun. I Think Mods should be an adult with background in game ethics and evidence merit  than heresay reports from players.

Maybe a new boss battle like a 
Boss enemy ship like a boss battle in world of warcraft where the boss  requires multiple player to work together to kill one boss.

I have had countless amazing experiences in this thrilling game.
Would recommend to all vr players who want a solid free game

amazing idk what to write i suggest this game to everyone who wants to have some naval pvp alot of kind people in the game ive never met anyone rude and ive always been invited to join their crew and sail with them
